MetaDataVersion.Name: TROPIC Trial SDTM Metadata Specification
MetaDataVersion.Description: Metadata specification for TROPIC Phase III re-analysis SDTM datasets

ItemGroupDef.Name: DM
ItemGroupDef.Label: Demographics
ItemGroupDef.Description: Demographics domain for the TROPIC trial datasets.

ItemGroupDef.Name: AE
ItemGroupDef.Structure: One record per subject per adverse event
ItemGroupDef.Label: Adverse Events
ItemGroupDef.Description: Adverse Events domain for the TROPIC trial datasets.

ItemGroupDef.Name: EX
ItemGroupDef.Structure: One record per subject per constant exposure cycle
ItemGroupDef.Label: Exposure
ItemGroupDef.Description: Exposure domain for the TROPIC trial datasets.

ItemGroupDef.Name: CM
ItemGroupDef.Structure: One record per subject per medication
ItemGroupDef.Label: Concomitant Medications
ItemGroupDef.Description: Concomitant Medications domain for the TROPIC trial datasets.

ItemGroupDef.Name: LB
ItemGroupDef.Structure: One record per subject per laboratory test per visit
ItemGroupDef.Label: Laboratory Test Results
ItemGroupDef.Description: Laboratory Test Results domain for the TROPIC trial datasets.

ItemGroupDef.Name: DS
ItemGroupDef.Structure: One record per subject per disposition event
ItemGroupDef.Label: Disposition
ItemGroupDef.Description: Disposition domain for the TROPIC trial datasets.

ItemGroupDef.Name: VS
ItemGroupDef.Structure: One record per subject per vital sign measurement per visit
ItemGroupDef.Label: Vital Signs
ItemGroupDef.Description: Vital Signs domain for the TROPIC trial datasets.

ItemGroupDef.Name: LS
ItemGroupDef.Structure: One record per subject per lesion per assessment visit
ItemGroupDef.Label: Lesion Assessment
ItemGroupDef.Description: Lesion Assessment domain for the TROPIC trial datasets.

ItemGroupDef.Name: PN
ItemGroupDef.Structure: One record per subject per pain assessment per visit
ItemGroupDef.Label: Pain Assessment
ItemGroupDef.Description: Pain Assessment domain for the TROPIC trial datasets.

ItemGroupDef.Name: SUPPDM
ItemGroupDef.Structure: One record per subject per supplemental qualifier
ItemGroupDef.Label: Supplemental Demographics
ItemGroupDef.Description: Supplemental Demographics domain for the TROPIC trial datasets.

ItemGroupDef.Name: SUPPAE
ItemGroupDef.Structure: One record per subject per adverse event per supplemental qualifier
ItemGroupDef.Label: Supplemental Adverse Events
ItemGroupDef.Description: Supplemental Adverse Events domain for the TROPIC trial datasets.

ItemGroupDef.Name: SUPPEX
ItemGroupDef.Structure: One record per subject per exposure cycle per supplemental qualifier
ItemGroupDef.Label: Supplemental Exposure
ItemGroupDef.Description: Supplemental Exposure domain for the TROPIC trial datasets.

ItemGroupDef.Name: SUPPCM
ItemGroupDef.Structure: One record per subject per medication per supplemental qualifier
ItemGroupDef.Label: Supplemental Concomitant Medications
ItemGroupDef.Description: Supplemental Concomitant Medications domain for the TROPIC trial datasets.

ItemGroupDef.Name: SUPPLB
ItemGroupDef.Structure: One record per subject per laboratory test per supplemental qualifier
ItemGroupDef.Label: Supplemental Laboratory Test Results
ItemGroupDef.Description: Supplemental Laboratory Test Results domain for the TROPIC trial datasets.

ItemGroupDef.Name: SUPPDS
ItemGroupDef.Structure: One record per subject per disposition event per supplemental qualifier
ItemGroupDef.Label: Supplemental Disposition
ItemGroupDef.Description: Supplemental Disposition domain for the TROPIC trial datasets.

ItemGroupDef.Name: SUPPLS
ItemGroupDef.Structure: One record per subject per lesion per supplemental qualifier
ItemGroupDef.Label: Supplemental Lesion Assessment
ItemGroupDef.Description: Supplemental Lesion Assessment domain for the TROPIC trial datasets.

ItemDef.Name: AETERM
ItemDef.Label: Reported Term for the Adverse Event

ItemDef.Name: CMTRT
ItemDef.Label: Reported Name of Drug, Med, or Therapy

ItemDef.Name: LBORRES
ItemDef.Label: Result or Finding in Original Units

ItemDef.Name: DSTERM
ItemDef.Label: Reported Term for the Disposition Event

ItemDef.Name: VSORRES
ItemDef.Label: Result or Finding in Original Units

ItemDef.Name: LSORRES
ItemDef.Label: Result or Finding in Original Units

ItemDef.Name: PNORRES
ItemDef.Label: Result or Finding in Original Units
